title: The Minds of Men
overview: WHAT IS THE “SCIENCE OF GOVERNMENT”? “The Minds of Men” is a 3+ year investigation into the experimentation, art, and practice of social engineering and mind control during the Cold War — a mind-bending journey into the past that gives startling insight into the world we are living in today.  It reveals [redacted].
